applies_when: User asks whether a trial or consult is available without route, time, or branch facts
User wants a fast answer in a public comment
items.response_goal: Keep the reply warm while turning a vague art-training inquiry into usable booking facts.
do: Acknowledge the wish to book quickly
Ask for the route, preferred time, and whether this is a first visit
Keep the next step easy enough to answer in one message
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我这次主要是想看艺考、考级、作品集还是兴趣提升，再加上你想来的时间，我可以先帮你把下一步收窄。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user provides route and time facts, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User says it is their first time or sounds unsure whether the route suits them
User is unsure what level or teacher suits them
items.response_goal: Reduce uncertainty first, then guide the user toward a simple and safe trial path.
do: Offer a simple way to narrow the route or current concern
Guide toward a low-pressure next step
avoid: Turning the reply into a hard sell
items.safe_transition: 第一次来先看适不适合很正常，我们可以先把你现在最想解决的点和可来的时间理清楚。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares direction and timing, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User mentions an exam, performance, portfolio deadline, or competition soon
User needs a trial before a deadline
items.response_goal: Keep momentum high while collecting the exact time window and route scope that decide whether the institution can help.
do: Ask when the deadline is and when the user hopes to come
Guide the next step toward a suitable slot and route fit
avoid: Guaranteeing all peak slots are available
Pushing a package before the trial is scoped
items.safe_transition: 如果你把比赛、考级或作品集的时间点和你最想解决的部分告诉我，会更容易判断先约哪一类试听。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares date and timing, hand off to Catcher.

applies_when: User compares packages without route context
items.response_goal: Avoid empty price comparison by lightly recovering scope.
do: Ask what route or concern the user is asking about
avoid: Hiding the role of route scope
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我是更偏艺考、考级、作品集还是兴趣训练，价格回答会更准确一些。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user gives route scope, route to Catcher.

applies_when: User says they came before or wants to return
User references their last class, trial, or practice result
items.response_goal: Make the user feel recognized while surfacing what they want this time.
do: Ask what they want to review or solve this time
Guide toward a smooth re-entry point
avoid: Treating a returning student like a cold lead
Jumping straight to a hard close
items.safe_transition: 如果你告诉我这次更想接上哪一段训练，我们就能更自然地帮你收窄下一步。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user shares prior context, route to FollowUp or Catcher.

applies_when: User talks about being too late, not talented enough, or embarrassed in public
The concern feels personal or performance-sensitive
items.response_goal: Protect dignity in public while still keeping the path to help open.
do: Avoid repeating the user's wording harshly
Offer a light path into a more specific next step
avoid: Turning a sensitive comment into a hard conversion script
items.safe_transition: 这种担心很常见，不用急着给自己下结论。你如果愿意说下现在卡在哪和大概什么时间方便，我们可以先帮你看路径。
items.handoff_suggestion: If the user continues with details, route to Catcher.
